data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Reduces decision-making time by presenting limited and prioritized options.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimizes interface for speedier navigation and accessibility.
data.technical_spec: Optimized Button Placement, Accessible Click Targets

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Design patterns familiar to the users for improved usability.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Chunk information to aid user cognition and prevent overload.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: An aesthetic design perceived as easier to use.
data.technical_spec: High Fidelity Mockups, Consistent Color Schemes
